$comment: JSON Schema validation schema for Zoho Mail email_metadata objects passed to IntegrityGate.pre_validate(). Field names marked HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED — see SECURITY_AUDIT.md.

messageId.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Zoho internal message ID field name

threadId.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Zoho thread grouping ID

fromAddress.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: sender address, format 'Name <email>'

receivedTime.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: epoch ms or ISO string — verify format from live API

content.description: HTML body content — may be empty for attachments-only emails

htmlContent.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: alternate HTML body field — verify which is populated

inReplyTo.description: RFC 2822 In-Reply-To header — used for thread chaining

folderId.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Zoho folder ID — not guaranteed to be integer
